title: RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN silently falls back without operator warning
description: main.rs line 73: RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN uses .and_then(v.parse().ok()).unwrap_or(120). All other env vars in main (KEEPALIVE_SECS, SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI, SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS) log a tracing::warn on invalid input. A typo in RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN silently uses 120 with no operator signal.
